headline: Django
description: Django is a high-level Python web framework (2005) that follows 'batteries-included' philosophy. ORM, admin interface, authentication, form handling, and templating are built-in. Follows MVT (Model-View-Template) architecture. Used by Instagram, Pinterest, Mozilla, Disqus.

citation.name: Django for APIs: Build Web APIs with Python and Django (2025 Edition)
citation.author: Vincent W.S.

citation.name: Python Web Frameworks in 2025: Django, FastAPI, and Flask
citation.author: multiple
